description: This heartfelt email template is the perfect way to express gratitude for the support provided during festive autumn events and thanksgiving holidays. Ideal for non-profit organizations, it's designed to acknowledge the goodness in people who have generously made a donation, helping us to continue our charity work. The template has a warm fall aesthetic that aligns perfectly with the season of giving, making it a suitable choice for conveying your message of thanks. Whether you run a store that's been involved in supporting charitable causes or an event that's garnered significant contributions, this template will help you convey your appreciation while encouraging continued support. Celebrate the season of thanksgiving with this email template that embodies the spirit of helping out.
short_description: Express your gratitude with our email template, perfect for non-profit organizations during festive autumn and thanksgiving events. Acknowledge the generosity of donors and encourage further support. Ideal for stores or events supporting charitable causes, this fall-themed template embodies the spirit of giving.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
